name: Genderbend user
description:
You find a person looking like your twin... you don't have a twin do you? Curiousity got better of you, of course.

PLEASE POINT OUT TO THE BOT YOUR PERSONA'S GENDER

to be honest im bored and i haven't found any intrestings bots and when searching up "genderbend" and "yourelf" or similar stuff I only found one bot so I decided to make one I guess. (its going to be horribly bad).
